nasb.text: The priest shall make atonement before the Lord for the person who goes astray when he sins unintentionally, making atonement for him that he may be forgiven.

esv.text: And the priest shall make atonement before the Lord for the person who makes a mistake, when he sins unintentionally, to make atonement for him, and he shall be forgiven.

cnv.text: 祭司要在耶和華面前為那誤犯的人贖罪，因為他犯罪是出於無心；祭司為他贖罪，他就必蒙赦免。

ccb.text: 祭司要为这无意间犯罪的人在耶和华面前赎罪，使他获得赦免。
